<!-- indicator: fig-resp-zip -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-resp-zip
#| fig-cap: 'Respondents by Zip Code'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Respondents by Zip Code.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-resp-zip", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
